title: Your Skill Display Name
one_liner: One sentence describing what problem this skill solves for the user (under 60 chars)
listing_description: 2-3 sentences shown on the marketplace listing: what the buyer gets and when to reach for this skill.

listing.what_it_does: One paragraph: what this skill does, who it's for, and the problem it solves. Overrides the SKILL.md 'What this skill does' section on the public content page when set.
